name: Green Office
address: 245 E Trinity Pl Unit 1210, Decatur, GA 30030
about: Green Office is a locally owned and operated community golf studio in the heart of Downtown Decatur, Georgia. The venue combines cutting-edge simulators with a warm, welcoming atmosphere, designed by a golfer for golfers of all levels. It offers flexible play options, from single sessions to memberships, and is a space for playing, practicing, and connecting with fellow golf enthusiasts rain or shine. Technology features include Uneekor EYE XO launch monitors for instant shot feedback and in-depth data analysis.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor EYE XO launch monitors provide instant shot feedback and in-depth data analysis
Flexible options to play with single sessions or Greenie Club memberships designed to fit any lifestyle
A warm, welcoming atmosphere designed for all levels of golfers to play, practice, and connect

No information on alcohol service provided.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Green Office does not offer rental clubs at this time, so you must bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no information provided about bringing outside food or drinks. The venue does not appear to have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a typical time for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is Green Office kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Green Office is kid-friendly as it welcomes 'golfers of all levels' and offers family-oriented programming and events.
